column1: # NOTE: this layout requires CONFIG_BOOTLOADER_OFFSET_IN_FLASH=0x1000 and CONFIG_PARTITION_TABLE_OFFSET=0x10000
# MCUboot binary is at 0x1000; primary slot begins at 0x20000 to accommodate the MCUboot binary (128 KB reservation)
# NOTE: 2MB MCUboot variant not available — dual-slot infeasible (2x1728k = 3.4MB > 2MB flash)
# NOTE: esp32h2 CLR image is 1728k (not 1664k as stated in the non-MCUboot CSV comments)
# Secondary slot — MCUboot upgrade candidate (same size as primary)
# Deployment area for Managed code — Image 1 primary+secondary (IMAGE_NUMBER=2)  244k each
